loc.square.name: Village Square
loc.square.description: A bustling square with cobblestone paths. A weathered guard watches the comings and goings.

loc.bakery.name: Village Bakery
loc.bakery.description: A warm bakery filled with the scent of fresh bread.

loc.market.name: Market Row
loc.market.description: Stalls line a busy street. A merchant calls out bargains to passers-by.

loc.north_gate.name: North Gate
loc.north_gate.description: A heavy timber gate marking the northern edge of the village.

loc.watchtower.name: Old Watchtower
loc.watchtower.description: A crumbling stone tower overlooking the forest. A torch rests in a wall bracket.

loc.forest_path.name: Forest Path
loc.forest_path.description: A narrow dirt path winding between tall pines. The air feels dangerous here.

loc.clearing.name: Forest Clearing
loc.clearing.description: A sunlit clearing where wild healing herbs grow. A dark stairway descends into the earth.

loc.crypt.name: Forgotten Crypt
loc.crypt.description: A cold, damp crypt. Bones litter the floor and something stirs in the shadows.

loc.tavern.name: The Prancing Pony
loc.tavern.description: A cozy tavern filled with warmth and laughter. Mugs of ale clink at every table.

loc.well.name: Wishing Well
loc.well.description: An old stone well at the edge of the square. Coins glint at the bottom.

item.ale.name: Frothy Ale
item.ale.description: A refreshing drink that restores energy.

item.herbs.name: Healing Herbs
item.herbs.description: Bundled wild herbs with healing properties.

item.torch.name: Old Torch
item.torch.description: A pitch torch that lights dark places.

item.gold_coin.name: Gold Coin
item.gold_coin.description: A shining coin of pure gold. A quest reward.

item.iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
item.iron_sword.description: A sturdy blade. Grants +5 attack in combat.

npc.guard.name: Village Guard
npc.guard.description: A stern-looking guard watching over the square.
dialogue: The crypt to the east has been overrun. Someone should deal with that goblin.

npc.baker.name: Village Baker
npc.baker.description: A cheerful baker dusted with flour.
dialogue: Fresh bread, baked this morning. Help yourself.

npc.barkeep.name: Tavern Barkeep
npc.barkeep.description: A burly barkeep polishing a mug.
dialogue: Mind the rowdy ones in the corner.

npc.merchant.name: Travelling Merchant
npc.merchant.description: A friendly merchant eager to trade.
dialogue: Welcome! What can I get for you today?
Bring me healing herbs and I'll reward you well.

npc.bandit.name: Forest Bandit
npc.bandit.description: A masked bandit blocking the path, blade drawn.

npc.goblin.name: Crypt Goblin
npc.goblin.description: A snarling goblin guarding the crypt.

npc.skeleton.name: Restless Skeleton
npc.skeleton.description: A rattling skeleton animated by dark magic.

fetch_herbs.description: Bring healing herbs to the merchant.

slay_goblin.description: Defeat the goblin haunting the crypt.
